# Managed PostgreSQL Platforms Expert Skill

This skill covers provider-specific behavior for managed PostgreSQL platforms used with pgPacTool,
including Azure Database for PostgreSQL, Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL, and Amazon Aurora
PostgreSQL-Compatible Edition.

## Use this skill when changing
- platform-sensitive role or privilege behavior
- ownership assumptions
- deployment/publish behavior on managed services
- reserved/admin-role handling
- extension/platform capability assumptions
